name: =?utf-8?Q?Kyle=2C=20Jindal=202016?=
subject: Jindal weekly update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jindal For President
body:
|
---
| | I hope you had a great weekend. I wanted to send you a quick email with some highlights from Governor Jindal’s week campaigning in Iowa.

**New poll: Jindal surging in Iowa**
NBC/Marist released a new poll that shows Governor Jindal has moved up to 6% in Iowa, tied with Ted Cruz and Marco Rubio for 5th place.The new poll puts him ahead of Mike Huckabee and Rick Santorum, among other conservative candidates. It also put Governor Jindal 1 point behind Jeb Bush and 2 points behind Carly Fiorina, well within the margin of error.

**Top Photo: Bobby & Olympic champion Dan Gable in Des Moines.**

[Follow the Governor on Instagram for more great photos from the campaign trail.](http://bobbyjindal.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3b861e295816e1c57ea4552ed&id=f209a3fb41&e=724c64cfa7)

**Top read: "Louisiana record makes Bobby Jindal worthy of White House”**
_Louisiana Gov. Bobby Jindal has done most of the things conservatives want the next president to do.

Louisiana has been the most pro-life state for six straight years. Jindal defunded Planned Parenthood. And when Planned Parenthood supporters protested, he simply put the undercover videos on loop outside to show exactly what they were supporting.

He's the only governor running who actually cut the size of government. He cut Louisiana's state government by 26 percent._

[Read more at DesMoinesRegister.com](http://bobbyjindal.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3b861e295816e1c57ea4552ed&id=617428437b&e=724c64cfa7)

**Top listen: Special edition Ace of Spades Podcast with Bobby Jindal**
The Governor had a great 40 minute interview talking about policy, his childhood, and you guessed it... Bradley Cooper. [Listen here.](http://bobbyjindal.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3b861e295816e1c57ea4552ed&id=442be1a8a8&e=724c64cfa7)

**New Store Item: Jindal for President t-shirt**
A new item was added to the campaign store. [You can order one of the new shirts here](http://bobbyjindal.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3b861e295816e1c57ea4552ed&id=3cce8df4f5&e=724c64cfa7).

Have a great week,
Kyle Plotkin
Communications Director, Jindal for President

[](http://bobbyjindal.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3b861e295816e1c57ea4552ed&id=dd5924fb1a&e=724c64cfa7)

---
| | | Paid for by Jindal For President
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2015 JINDAL FOR PRESIDENT, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email as a supporter of Bobby Jindal

**Our mailing address is:**
JINDAL FOR PRESIDENTP.O. BOX 5101BATON ROUGE, LA 70821
[Add us to your address book](http://bobbyjindal.us11.list-manage.com/vcard?u=3b861e295816e1c57ea4552ed&id=36e884e022)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](http://bobbyjindal.us11.list-manage2.com/profile?u=3b861e295816e1c57ea4552ed&id=36e884e022&e=724c64cfa7) or [unsubscribe from this list](http://bobbyjindal.us11.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=3b861e295816e1c57ea4552ed&id=36e884e022&e=724c64cfa7&c=2d56225592)

---

name: Anna Rogers, MarcoRubio.com
subject: Fwd: Thank you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
| | | | | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44269435:668N7ALNZ:m:1:1349778030:06151DEB4F4FE3D58B63DF9C43494688:r)
---
| | | | Peter, Marco just sent this message to thank our donors who supported us with a contribution in the last three months. As you know, last Wednesday was another critical fundraising deadline for our campaign and thousands of supporters gave generously to help Marco. I wanted to make sure you saw this pledge from Marco to every one of our donors:
---
| "We promise to spend your donation wisely, efficiently, and effectively."
---
| It's a promise we've kept over the last six months of the campaign and will continue to keep. I hope you'll remember this promise when we ask for your support in the future. Be sure to follow the campaign on **[Facebook](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44269436:668N7ALNZ:m:1:1349778030:06151DEB4F4FE3D58B63DF9C43494688:r)** and **[Twitter](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44269437:668N7ALNZ:m:1:1349778030:06151DEB4F4FE3D58B63DF9C43494688:r)** to get the very latest news and information. Sincerely, Anna RogersFinance DirectorMarco Rubio for President
\---------- Forwarded message ----------From: Marco RubioDate: Mon, Oct 5, 2015 at 12:07 PMSubject: Thank you!To: Anna Rogers Friends, Thank you so much for your support during our most recent fundraising quarter. I realize that we send you a lot of emails asking for donations, but it's important to running a successful campaign and your donations truly do make an impact. With your support, we'll continue to grow our team, hear from voters around the country, and deliver our positive, optimistic message about building a New American Century. I'm so grateful for your dedication and commitment to this campaign. I know that times are tough for millions of Americans and contributing to a cause you believe in is a sacrifice for many. With that in mind, we promise to spend your donation wisely, efficiently, and effectively. Please be sure to follow along with our campaign on **[Facebook](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44269436:668N7ALNZ:m:1:1349778030:06151DEB4F4FE3D58B63DF9C43494688:r)** and **[Twitter](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44269437:668N7ALNZ:m:1:1349778030:06151DEB4F4FE3D58B63DF9C43494688:r)** to see your support in action. Thank you!
Marco Rubio
---
| | | | Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
---

Too many emails? Click [here](https://marcorubio.com/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com) to receive updates less often.[

PO Box 558701 | Miami, FL 33255-8701

name: =?utf-8?Q?Tim=2C=20Jindal=202016?=
subject: New Iowa Poll
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jindal For President
body:
|
---
| |
A new NBC/Marist poll released yesterday shows Governor Jindal has moved up to 5th place in Iowa. That puts him currently in a tie with Ted Cruz and Marco Rubio. The Gov is now ahead of Mike Huckabee and Rick Santorum, the 2008 and 2012 winners of the Iowa caucuses.

In fact, Governor Jindal is just one point behind Jeb Bush and two points behind Carly Fiorina, well within the margin of error.

Momentum is building in Iowa. Just look at this chart showing four NBC/Marist polls from this year:

[](http://bobbyjindal.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3b861e295816e1c57ea4552ed&id=86c8985e2b&e=724c64cfa7)

While the media is focused on national poll numbers, our focus is squarely on Iowa. And we like what we are seeing. Governor Jindal continues to be one of the most popular candidates in the field, and his support on the ballot is beginning to follow.

Here is where we need your help: our grassroots campaign is working, but running for President is really expensive -- even with the lean and mean campaign we have built. We hate sending you all of these emails asking for money, but it is the only way we can run a grassroots campaign that will beat the DC establishment candidates in Iowa and ride that momentum right into the White House.

[Will you chip in $100, $50 or even $25 right now so Governor Jindal can continue to share his vision for America and keep our momentum building in Iowa?](http://bobbyjindal.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3b861e295816e1c57ea4552ed&id=f72c8bce6a&e=724c64cfa7)

Thanks,

Tim Saler,
Deputy Campaign Manager, Jindal for President

[](http://bobbyjindal.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3b861e295816e1c57ea4552ed&id=8cf9fbb46f&e=724c64cfa7)

---
| | | Paid for by Jindal For President
---
|
---

You are receiving this email as a supporter of Bobby Jindal

**Our mailing address is:**
JINDAL FOR PRESIDENTP.O. BOX 5101BATON ROUGE, LA 70821
[Add us to your address book](http://bobbyjindal.us11.list-manage.com/vcard?u=3b861e295816e1c57ea4552ed&id=36e884e022)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](http://bobbyjindal.us11.list-manage.com/profile?u=3b861e295816e1c57ea4552ed&id=36e884e022&e=724c64cfa7) or [unsubscribe from this list](http://bobbyjindal.us11.list-manage1.com/unsubscribe?u=3b861e295816e1c57ea4552ed&id=36e884e022&e=724c64cfa7&c=13120cf763)

name: randhpaulmd@gmail.com
subject: New gun control assaults?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative,

Hillary Clinton is taking a page out of Obama's playbook of "never letting a crisis go to waste."

After the recent tragic shooting in Oregon, I'm afraid Second Amendment supporters need to gear up for yet another massive push for gun control.

Anti-gun members of the press are already demonizing Second Amendment supporters and shaming Congress for "not taking action" on what they call "common sense" gun control legislation.

The stage is set for anything to happen -- including magazine bans, new regulations on gun shows and even expanded or universal "background checks."

**[Can I count on you to take action by signing your"STOP RADICAL GUN CONTROL" petition right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30816119:WyImNtmNc:m:1:879035888:79F83E24CE7B03D20FF55FDE49F4AC26:r)**?

I led the fight in 2013 that defeated ALL eight of Obama's anti-gun bills in the U.S. Senate -- and, Fellow Conservative, the field is ripe for yet another national showdown over your gun rights.

As the most pro-gun candidate running for President, I won't hesitate to stand in the national spotlight and go toe-to-toe against Hillary Clinton and her anti-gun pals in the media.

That's exactly what I did earlier this year when Obama's Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms and Explosives (BATFE) attempted to rush through a ban on common M855 ammo.

Tens of thousands of grassroots supporters answered my call to action and stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me by flooding the BATFE with fax petitions. Just a few days later, the BATFE reversed course and shelved their anti-gun scheme, and Obama's backdoor ammo ban was defeated.

But I'm worried about what could happen if Second Amendment supporters let down our guard.

After Hillary Clinton dangerously labeled Second Amendment supporters last year as a minority who "terrorizes" the majority of Americans, I truly believe the anti-gun crowd would happily shred our Second Amendment.

Hillary even went so far as to admit, if elected President, she would play dictator and pass gun control through unilateral, executive orders if Congress refused to abide by her will.

Her comments came after Obama's former Attorney General Eric Holder publicly admitted that failing to RAM through more gun control was his single biggest failure to date.

It's a basic truth that gun control isn't effective because criminals simply refuse to obey the law or drop their weapons at the direction of "gun free zone" signs.

But facts don't matter to elitists like Hillary Clinton, Fellow Conservative.

This is exactly why our Founding Fathers wrote the Second Amendment, to specifically restrict people from using the force of the federal government to infringe on your gun rights.

**[So please make your voice heard by signing your"STOP RADICAL GUN CONTROL" petition right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30816119:WyImNtmNc:m:1:879035888:79F83E24CE7B03D20FF55FDE49F4AC26:r)**.

I'm running for President to stand up for the Second Amendment AND the ENTIRE Bill of Rights. And, if elected President, I will continue to fight every single day for your Liberty and for limited, constitutional government in America.

So after you sign your petition, **[please make your most generous contribution of $20.16](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30816119:WyImNtmNc:m:1:879035888:79F83E24CE7B03D20FF55FDE49F4AC26:r)** to help me reach as many voters as possible in the early primary states and elect a friend of the Second Amendment to the White House in 2016.

Thank you in advance for standing with me in this fight.

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30816120:WyImNtmNc:m:1:879035888:79F83E24CE7B03D20FF55FDE49F4AC26:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30816121:WyImNtmNc:m:1:879035888:79F83E24CE7B03D20FF55FDE49F4AC26:r)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30816122:WyImNtmNc:m:1:879035888:79F83E24CE7B03D20FF55FDE49F4AC26:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30816123:WyImNtmNc:m:1:879035888:79F83E24CE7B03D20FF55FDE49F4AC26:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30816119:WyImNtmNc:m:1:879035888:79F83E24CE7B03D20FF55FDE49F4AC26:r)

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30816119:WyImNtmNc:m:1:879035888:79F83E24CE7B03D20FF55FDE49F4AC26:r)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30816124:WyImNtmNc:m:1:879035888:79F83E24CE7B03D20FF55FDE49F4AC26:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30816125:WyImNtmNc:m:1:879035888:79F83E24CE7B03D20FF55FDE49F4AC26:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30816126:WyImNtmNc:m:1:879035888:79F83E24CE7B03D20FF55FDE49F4AC26:r)
Paid for by Rand Paul for President

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)

name: Team Murphy
subject: Grayson DESPERATE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Friend,

**Alan Grayson is embarrassing himself with personal attacks against Patrick that are as desperate as they are false.** He does it so often, _Florida Politics Blog_ has a name for it: Grayson's "Murphy-bashing mode."

Of course, there's little to no fact behind the names Grayson chooses to call Patrick. There's no substance to his attacks. But that's never stopped Grayson before.

Here's the cold hard fact: **Grayson 's getting desperate**. Polls have shown that Patrick has a MUCH better chance of beating Republicans in the fall. Grayson knows he's less electable, so he's rolling out the Tea Party-style mud slinging to win.

[**We have to step up to support Patrick and fight against Grayson 's outrageous attacks. Help us kickstart October with a $5 contribution toward our $35,000 goal.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2152/738133e4/3a5b3bf9/7f8ff35e/2733686457/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme151004?refcode=pme151004_m&recurring=true")

Patrick isn't a foaming-at-the-mouth partisan. Unorthodox as it may be for Washington these days, Patrick actually likes to _**get things done**_ in Congress through cooperation.

He also has some experience beating opponents with more bark than bite -- Patrick beat the Tea Party darling Rep. Allen West in 2012.

Grayson may believe "Murphy-bashing mode" will be enough to knock Patrick out of the race. But Patrick's faced attacks before. He won't back down.

**And neither will we.**

[**We had a great FEC quarter -- and we have to keep that success going. If you can, chip in $5 or $10 to start off October strong.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2152/738133e4/3a5b3bf9/7f8ff35e/2733686457/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme151004?refcode=pme151004_m&recurring=true")

Thanks for your help!

Team Murphy | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2152/738133e4/3a5b3bf9/7f8ff35f/2733686457/VEsF/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")
---

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Some bad news on TPP this morning
body:
#
[**Sign my petition to join our fight against the disastrous Trans Pacific Partnership trade deal. We cannot afford to let this trade deal hurt consumers and cost America jobs.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb251d/43f17890/5798caf5/621fd1b5/3183986543/VEsH/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/stop-tpp?source=em151005full")
Dear Brothers and Sisters,
Wall Street and big corporations just won a big victory to advance a disastrous trade deal. Now it's on us to stop it from becoming law.
This morning, negotiators announced an "agreement in principle" for something called the Trans Pacific Partnership (TPP), meaning it will soon move to Congress for approval.
The TPP would expand the same failed "free trade" policies to 12 other nations that have already cost millions of jobs and shuttered tens of thousands of factories across the United States.
Make no mistake: if TPP passes, it will further hurt consumers and cost American jobs. **So we must stop it, together.**
In the Senate, I will do all that I can to defeat this agreement. **But I need you at my side in this fight, because we will be going against some of the biggest, strongest corporations in the world.**
[**Add your name to mine to stand against the disastrous Trans Pacific Partnership trade deal. Let's show them that people can prevail over corporations.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb251d/43f17890/5798caf5/621fd1b5/3183986543/VEsE/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/stop-tpp?source=em151005full")
The TPP follows in the footsteps of other unfettered free trade agreements like NAFTA and CAFTA that have been supported by corporate America and that cost America millions of decent-paying jobs.
Since 2001, nearly 60,000 manufacturing plants in this country have been shut down, and we have lost almost 5 million decent-paying manufacturing jobs. NAFTA alone led to the loss of almost three-quarters of a million jobs -- the Permanent Normalized Trade Agreement with China cost America four times that number: almost 3 million jobs. These agreements are not the only reason why manufacturing in the United States has declined, but they are important factors.
The TPP would also give multinational corporations the ability to challenge laws passed in the United States that could negatively impact their "expected future profits." Take, for example, a French waste management firm suing Egypt for over $100 million for increasing the minimum wage and improving labor laws. Egypt's "crime" in this case is trying to improve life for their low-wage workers. Or Vattenfall, a Swedish energy company, has used this process to sue Germany for $5 billion over its decision to phase out nuclear power. Should the people of Germany have the right to make energy choices on their own or should these decisions be left in the hands of an unelected international tribunal?
We face the same threats here at home if the TPP passes.
Virtually every major union and environmental organization in the United States is against the deal. Major religious groups are as well because they know what it could mean for some of the poorest people on the planet.
Wall Street, corporate America and their representatives in Congress will try to pass this bad trade deal. This is our chance to make our voices heard.
[**Click here to add your name to mine to stand against passing the disastrous Trans Pacific Partnership trade deal.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb251d/43f17890/5798caf5/621fd1b5/3183986543/VEsF/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/stop-tpp?source=em151005full")
Not a lot of presidential candidates would use their campaigns to influence legislation being considered in Congress. Some candidates haven't even expressed an opinion on this critical issue, which, frankly, I don't really understand.
But as I've said before, this campaign is not about Bernie Sanders, Hillary Clinton, or Jeb Bush -- it's about the needs of the American people.
And we need a new approach to trade in this country -- one that benefits working families and not just the CEOs of multinational corporations.
Thank you for standing with working families.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders

[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb251d/43f17890/5798caf5/621fd1b2/3183986543/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=em151005tpp")

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb251d/43f17890/5798caf5/621fd1b3/3183986543/VEsD/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb251d/43f17890/5798caf5/621fd1b0/3183986543/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb251d/43f17890/5798caf5/621fd1b1/3183986543/VEsB/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb251d/43f17890/5798caf5/621fd1be/3183986543/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").
clean_body: "" Dear Brothers and Sisters, Wall Street and big corporations just won a big victory to advance a disastrous trade deal. Now it's on us to stop it from becoming law. This morning, negotiators announced an "agreement in principle" for something called the Trans Pacific Partnership (TPP), meaning it will soon move to Congress for approval. The TPP would expand the same failed "free trade" policies to 12 other nations that have already cost millions of jobs and shuttered tens of thousands of factories across the United States. Make no mistake: if TPP passes, it will further hurt consumers and cost American jobs. So we must stop it, together. In the Senate, I will do all that I can to defeat this agreement. But I need you at my side in this fight, because we will be going against some of the biggest, strongest corporations in the world. "" The TPP follows in the footsteps of other unfettered free trade agreements like NAFTA and CAFTA that have been supported by corporate America and that cost America millions of decent-paying jobs. Since 2001, nearly 60,000 manufacturing plants in this country have been shut down, and we have lost almost 5 million decent-paying manufacturing jobs. NAFTA alone led to the loss of almost three-quarters of a million jobs -- the Permanent Normalized Trade Agreement with China cost America four times that number: almost 3 million jobs. These agreements are not the only reason why manufacturing in the United States has declined, but they are important factors. The TPP would also give multinational corporations the ability to challenge laws passed in the United States that could negatively impact their "expected future profits." Take, for example, a French waste management firm suing Egypt for over $100 million for increasing the minimum wage and improving labor laws. Egypt's "crime" in this case is trying to improve life for their low-wage workers. Or Vattenfall, a Swedish energy company, has used this process to sue Germany for $5 billion over its decision to phase out nuclear power. Should the people of Germany have the right to make energy choices on their own or should these decisions be left in the hands of an unelected international tribunal? We face the same threats here at home if the TPP passes. Virtually every major union and environmental organization in the United States is against the deal. Major religious groups are as well because they know what it could mean for some of the poorest people on the planet. Wall Street, corporate America and their representatives in Congress will try to pass this bad trade deal. This is our chance to make our voices heard. "" Not a lot of presidential candidates would use their campaigns to influence legislation being considered in Congress. Some candidates haven't even expressed an opinion on this critical issue, which, frankly, I don't really understand. But as I've said before, this campaign is not about Bernie Sanders, Hillary Clinton, or Jeb Bush -- it's about the needs of the American people. And we need a new approach to trade in this country -- one that benefits working families and not just the CEOs of multinational corporations. Thank you for standing with working families. In solidarity, Bernie Sanders "" Paid for by Bernie 2016 PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE

name: John Kasich
subject: Syria
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich For America, www
body:
[](www.JohnKasich.com)

Peter, last week I called for a no-fly zone in Syria to protect civilians and refugees. [Watch this short video and share it if you agree](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30818504:sTM86tmN_:m:1:958431888:28530F48138DB80112EF650791244E12:r):

[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30818504:sTM86tmN_:m:1:958431888:28530F48138DB80112EF650791244E12:r)

**No candidate in the race has as much foreign policy plus executive experience as I do**. If I'm elected President, America's days of leading from behind will be over.

**The world needs American leadership!**

Peter, with your help, we can win this campaign and go on to make our country stronger and more safe.

In case you missed the news, [New Hampshire Sen. Gordon Humphrey endorsed my candidacy last week](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30818505:sTM86tmN_:m:1:958431888:28530F48138DB80112EF650791244E12:r) and we have the most impactful grassroots support team in the critical primary state. [Read more here](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30818505:sTM86tmN_:m:1:958431888:28530F48138DB80112EF650791244E12:r).

**Please consider a generous contribution to help us keep growing our support!

**
[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30818506:sTM86tmN_:m:1:958431888:28530F48138DB80112EF650791244E12:r)

Thank you for all that you're doing to help!

-John

**John Kasich**
Governor of Ohio
[

Mark Campbell

Cruz for President

_The Hill_
[Ted Cruz sees slow and steady path to 2016 presidential victory](http://em.tedcruz.org/wf/click?upn=oxRiKmNZf-2B-2FjHRySYBDLy09v5edMMZm9mVbjZI6SnjxV37nQjVPcVrypJuiccN4Gei313BDwLyn-2F0U-2Ft4PPk-2F7a-2FGNgyHXe9Q51ZAYzzbQlH8-2BjJqYXO7UedNhwj9fue94i0f5kQ8TRtPWcyvdcgQA-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCHzsPcOGAPfxdUgulONNnZznb-2FoDg5rL0qB4eJ6Thul49pJw0wWAMeKfFWPlo6KV-2BVdf8cdkEcIC63UA9BNOn22XzqeVHr8xTyEGUntrDCNxdguP7aQ7z-2BLmLj8m8D3e05gVZXr2sJKv-2Bhz-2FcujiLj05FpVHtPwuRscdF46DA7QLSjdi65-2BleKb1AVvvF87Wsi1OTGnL93YqdPVckxhNvMuatTRtaZxfSgckhEbhzGKGpYBvn5a5AMefUHI7Rw-2Fqr3N4lYGxIGzxGNDDU-2B6zVYj65JPe4O546bXYDM9EYaGtuI5FN17wgxzaNDnx3EHxhDGcFX-2FgsOzlnTe2E12XGF92ic7plg2fbgMVdYB0AVPERHbxiwt9ktIivFjN7EUswo-3D)
Ben Kamisar
October 5, 2015

Ted Cruz is playing a slow and steady campaign but for the firebrand Texas senator, that doesn't translate into being quiet.

In the past week alone, he has stolen supporters from fellow candidate Rand Paul, won the rousing support of evangelicals and had to be shut down by Senate leaders for trying to complicate efforts on a short-term funding extension with a protest vote against Planned Parenthood funding.

That reflects Cruz's efforts to try to emerge as the consensus anti-establishment candidate if and when the top three outsider candidates, and his biggest rivals, peter out.

Rolling out Libertarian supporters who previously backed Kentucky Sen. Rand Paul's father in his presidential bids is part of Cruz's aim to go after his rivals on their home field.

"Our theory has always been that you need to crush your bracket first in order to advance," Rick Tyler, a Cruz spokesperson, said, comparing the primary slog to the annual college basketball tournament.

"We don't want to break out...we are moving slow and steady."

Tyler sees the GOP primary electorate as four distinct "brackets" of voters--libertarian, evangelical, Tea Party, and establishment candidates--and it's clear that Cruz continues to make a play for all but the latter.

Cruz's "Liberty Leaders for Cruz" coalition, is made up of mostly former Rep. Ron Paul (Texas) supporters, a direct affront at Paul.

And the attack has come as Paul's support has waned in the polls and amid reports that he's shifted some emphasis toward fundraising for his Senate reelection.

[**Read more here**](http://em.tedcruz.org/wf/click?upn=oxRiKmNZf-2B-2FjHRySYBDLy09v5edMMZm9mVbjZI6SnjxV37nQjVPcVrypJuiccN4Gei313BDwLyn-2F0U-2Ft4PPk-2F7a-2FGNgyHXe9Q51ZAYzzbQlH8-2BjJqYXO7UedNhwj9fue94i0f5kQ8TRtPWcyvdcgQA-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCHzsPcOGAPfxdUgulONNnZzA0Y-2BerqNgZpZeOQVbQrLjICtf6fb18ScJ8oNfEXqCynZzsEW4QSbSuRQF8XI1difEHatPz6E9LGWyuzEEi-2FG8njJj3s0MCgbdCsCWCB8hDbOqvdPUUTEaFbk7AA-2Fr9gBZ8jyMHEE-2BXQGBCyCJgk9zYHC-2FrmRzGQXSz6yWxndoc0SRxBzlpTX-2BtrYeG0BAB-2F1jv03-2Bq-2BtkSbEbQrCyjyTOUgj0HXL0ZyW-2BTnd9y4cMHuUYHfwOoMOA-2B6QMBpeGGdGeZGIB-2FXbTZlPxTRxl8Q2HY8XanpQLmGu1sBwWe86RhuRL6gE2WmFsoZ5bCNU-2FhGArLcFsuuUqGrvSIoGsx7OWSWwqPG8c8u8HwHLiIZgjLU-3D)

For Liberty, Mark Campbell National Political Director Cruz for President The Hill Ben Kamisar October 5, 2015 Ted Cruz is playing a slow and steady campaign but for the firebrand Texas senator, that doesn't translate into being quiet. In the past week alone, he has stolen supporters from fellow candidate Rand Paul, won the rousing support of evangelicals and had to be shut down by Senate leaders for trying to complicate efforts on a short-term funding extension with a protest vote against Planned Parenthood funding. That reflects Cruz's efforts to try to emerge as the consensus anti-establishment candidate if and when the top three outsider candidates, and his biggest rivals, peter out. Rolling out Libertarian supporters who previously backed Kentucky Sen. Rand Paul's father in his presidential bids is part of Cruz's aim to go after his rivals on their home field. "Our theory has always been that you need to crush your bracket first in order to advance," Rick Tyler, a Cruz spokesperson, said, comparing the primary slog to the annual college basketball tournament. "We don't want to break out...we are moving slow and steady." Tyler sees the GOP primary electorate as four distinct "brackets" of voters--libertarian, evangelical, Tea Party, and establishment candidates--and it's clear that Cruz continues to make a play for all but the latter. Cruz's "Liberty Leaders for Cruz" coalition, is made up of mostly former Rep. Ron Paul (Texas) supporters, a direct affront at Paul. And the attack has come as Paul's support has waned in the polls and amid reports that he's shifted some emphasis toward fundraising for his Senate reelection. | Paid for by Cruz for President www.tedcruz.org | To unsubscribe please click | Mark Campbell P.O.
